narrative:
Canal Win-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,273 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
